HomePage.metaTitle: Holiday Apartment Herrsching on Lake Ammersee — Sonnenhof from 85€
HomePage.metaDescription: Holiday apartment & guesthouse in Herrsching: 5 apartments + 7 rooms right on Lake Ammersee. Family-run for 40 years. Dogs welcome. Free parking.

WohnenPage.metaTitle: Accommodation Herrsching — Holiday Apartment & Guesthouse on Lake Ammersee
WohnenPage.metaDescription: All accommodation at Sonnenhof Herrsching: 5 holiday apartments (from 90€) and 7 guest rooms (from 75€) on Lake Ammersee. Ideal for families, couples & dog owners.
WohnenPage.heroTitle: Your Accommodation on Lake Ammersee – Apartments & Rooms
WohnenPage.heroSubtitle: Choose between spacious holiday apartments and comfortable guest rooms
WohnenPage.introText: Whether for a longer stay with the whole family or a short business trip – you'll find the perfect accommodation with us.
WohnenPage.apartmentDescription: From 27 to 55 m² for 2-5 guests. With private kitchen and balcony or terrace. Ideal for families.
WohnenPage.roomDescription: Double and single rooms, with or without balcony. Private bathroom and access to shared kitchenette.
WohnenPage.apartmentOrRoomText: The key difference: Our holiday apartments have their own kitchen where you can cook for yourself – ideal for families and longer stays of a week or more. The guest rooms are more compact and perfect for shorter stays from 2 nights. Instead of a kitchen, you have access to a shared kitchenette on the 1st floor with coffee machine, kettle, fridge and toaster.
WohnenPage.locationText: All accommodation is located in the Sonnenhof at Summerstraße 23 in Herrsching on Lake Ammersee – just 50 metres from the lakeside. From here you can easily reach the Ammersee cycle path, the boat service to Diessen and Andechs Monastery on foot or by bicycle. Herrsching S-Bahn station (S8) is a 10-minute walk away – and you'll be at Munich's Marienplatz in 45 minutes.
WohnenPage.familyText: The Sonnenhof is run by owner Conny, representing the third generation. There's no anonymous hotel service here – you always speak directly to the owner. Whether you have special requests, need excursion tips or want an early check-in: Conny takes care of everything personally. That's why many of our guests come back year after year.
WohnenPage.goodToKnowText: All accommodation comes with a private bathroom, free Wi-Fi and a free parking space on site. Dogs are warmly welcome (10€/night). Children up to 3 years stay free of charge. Bed linen and towels are included. A visitor's tax of 2.00€ per night per adult is charged by the municipality of Herrsching.
WohnenPage.speakToOwner: You always speak to the owner
WohnenPage.speakToOwnerText: Please don't hesitate to ask. With us, you talk to real people, not computers.

PreisePage.metaDescription: All prices at a glance: 5 holiday apartments (90-112€) & 7 guest rooms (75-117€) at Sonnenhof Herrsching on Lake Ammersee. Low season discount, extra costs & booking info.
PreisePage.heroSubtitle: Transparent and fair – all prices per night at a glance. Bed linen, towels, Wi-Fi and parking are always included.
PreisePage.alwaysIncludedText: No surprises on your bill. Everything essential is already included in the nightly rate – from bed linen and Wi-Fi to parking. There is no separate cleaning fee.
PreisePage.paymentText: We accept bank transfer in advance and cash payment on arrival.
PreisePage.noCards: Unfortunately we cannot accept debit/credit cards.

KontaktPage.metaDescription: No-obligation enquiry to Sonnenhof Herrsching. Personal advice from owner Conny. 5 holiday apartments & 7 guest rooms on Lake Ammersee.
KontaktPage.heroSubtitle: You always speak to the owner personally
KontaktPage.arrivalText: Daily between 3:00 PM and 6:00 PM or by arrangement.
KontaktPage.inquiriesText: Enquiries welcome all day by email or phone. You always speak directly to the owner.
KontaktPage.apartmentsBooking: Available weekly from weekend to weekend
KontaktPage.paymentText: Payment can be made by bank transfer in advance or cash on arrival.
KontaktPage.noCards: Important: Unfortunately we cannot accept debit or credit cards.
KontaktPage.depositRequired: A deposit is required when booking a holiday apartment.
KontaktPage.cancellationText1: Unfortunately, free cancellation is not possible. If a trip cannot be made, the full cost must still be paid.
KontaktPage.cancellationText2: We are too small to bear this risk for our guests. Guests would need to cover this risk through private travel cancellation insurance, which is available at a low cost.
KontaktPage.cancellationText3: However, we make every effort to find replacement bookings. In that case, payment is naturally not required.
KontaktPage.speakToOwner: You always speak to the owner
KontaktPage.personallyText: Please don't hesitate to ask. With us, you talk to real people, not computers. You always speak directly to the owner.
KontaktPage.weReplyQuickly: We will get back to you as soon as possible.
KontaktPage.byCarText: A96 Munich-Lindau, exit Inning am Ammersee. From there approximately 8 km to Herrsching. Free parking on site.
KontaktPage.bySBahnText: S8 from Munich Central Station to Herrsching (final stop). Journey time approximately 45 minutes to Marienplatz/city centre. We are a 10-minute walk from the station.
KontaktPage.airportNote: The S8 also goes directly to Munich Airport – perfect for guests without a car!

UeberUnsPage.metaDescription: Family-run in the 3rd generation – led by women. Hosts with passion for over 40 years in Herrsching on Lake Ammersee.
UeberUnsPage.heroTitle: The Sonnenhof Family – Run by Women for Three Generations
UeberUnsPage.p1: The Sonnenhof has been run by the women of our family for three generations. For over 40 years we have been part of Herrsching, adapting to the times without forgetting our roots.
UeberUnsPage.p2Bold: We are Bavarian and value quality, sustainability and closeness.
UeberUnsPage.p2: With us, you talk to real people, not AI or computers. When you call, you always speak to the owner personally.
UeberUnsPage.p3: What sets us apart? The perfect balance between Bavarian tradition and modern comfort. We have everything you need: beautiful holiday apartments and rooms, an excellent location, parking and good internet.
UeberUnsPage.p4: Herrsching is our home, and we know every corner of this beautiful region. Whether you're looking for the best hiking trails, a secret restaurant tip, or want to know when the steamboat cruise is most beautiful – we're here for you.
UeberUnsPage.dogsChildrenWelcome: Dogs and children warmly welcome! The whole family feels at home with us – including four-legged members.
UeberUnsPage.alwaysChef: You always speak to the owner.
UeberUnsPage.ourHistory: Our Story – Three Generations on Lake Ammersee
UeberUnsPage.beginningsText: It all began in the 1980s when my grandmother acquired the house at Summerstraße 23. Even then she knew: this location in Herrsching, just a few minutes' walk from Lake Ammersee, was made for hosting guests. She furnished the first rooms and welcomed visitors with Bavarian warmth – just as we still do today.
UeberUnsPage.secondGenText: My mother took over the Sonnenhof and expanded it further. Simple guest rooms became comfortable holiday apartments with their own kitchen and balcony. The circle of regular guests grew – many families returned year after year. Some of them still visit us today, now with their own children.
UeberUnsPage.todayText: Today I, Conny, run the Sonnenhof as the third generation. With 5 holiday apartments and 7 guest rooms, we have deliberately stayed small. No anonymous hotel, no booking-portal monotony. When you enquire with us, it's not algorithms that respond – it's me personally.
UeberUnsPage.daySubtitle: What actually happens behind the scenes of a small guesthouse?
UeberUnsPage.personalText: With us, you talk to real people, not computers. No call centre – you always speak directly to the owner.
UeberUnsPage.qualityText: For over 40 years we have valued well-maintained accommodation and a high standard for our guests.
UeberUnsPage.sustainableText: We are mindful of resources and committed to our regional roots.
UeberUnsPage.closenessText: We are part of Herrsching and know the region inside out – ask us for tips!
